THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. "DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AND PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITHIN 3 YEARS OF INITIAL FILING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY SHELLY CRUZ--AAA (FIELD SENIOR CASUALTY SPECIALIST) FOR DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
